eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 3:15 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 4:15 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert from Wheeler County Sheriff's Office: The evacuation level for  Zone WHH-03A N of Sugar Loaf Mtn to Beard Canyon, W of Rowe Cr to E of Dry Hlw in Twicknhm area upgraded from Level 2 to a Level 3- GO NOW! Evacuate Immediately. There is significant danger in your area. If you need evacuation assistance call Frontier Regional 541-384-2080.
